title: Comments
description: Write comments that document your code
template:

print('Are you ready to begin our journey?')
solution:

title: Numbers
template:
health = 100
damage = 25.5
print('Health:', health)
print('Damage:', damage)
solution:
health = 100
damage = 25.5
print('Health:', health)
print('Damage:', damage)
print(health - damage)
